title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 6th April 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.detail: Viewer holds Canara Bank bought at ~Rs 100 with a long-term view. Kutumba Rao: that's fine, no problem, hold.

recommendations.note: Hold and average; promoters buying on dips, infra to have good days.
recommendations.detail: Hold; in fact average it. After correction, promoters buying at lower levels regularly (valuation visible). Govt will spend on infrastructure to sustain the economy, so low-debt infra companies with strong order books will do well; NCC will do well in coming days at its net current valuation.

recommendations.stock: Asset Management Companies (AMCs, e.g. Nippon Life AMC)
recommendations.note: Buy AMCs in this weakness; they jump with better valuations when bull market returns.
recommendations.detail: For a viewer wanting a holding company: buy AMCs now in the weakness, because all AMCs will jump nicely with better valuations once the bull market returns (e.g. Nippon went above 1,000, now ~800). Individual holding companies (Jindal, Birla groups) can be picked once results start coming.

recommendations.note: At 38% loss; momentum down, in correction; hold, decent stocks not to be dumped.
recommendations.detail: Momentum reduced; in long consolidation / correction phase. Hold for now; decent stocks, not to be thrown away; in current conditions they're in a downtrend. Average or switch to other stocks only when rallies return.

recommendations.note: Add on dips; strong order book (~Rs 1,00,000 cr), fresh orders keep coming.
recommendations.detail: Add on dips; strong order book, around Rs 1,00,000 crore to be executed; fresh orders keep coming time and again.

recommendations.note: Wait for results; buy fresh only if results/outlook good, else will underperform.
recommendations.detail: Look at results first; buy fresh only if the results and outlook are good, otherwise the stock will underperform.

recommendations.note: Wait for results; go fresh only if results/outlook good, else will underperform.
recommendations.detail: Look at results first; if results and outlook are good you can go into fresh positions, otherwise it will underperform.

recommendations.note: Buy as medium-term dark horse closer to 27-28; small risky bet, don't over-allocate.
recommendations.detail: Had said sell from the start, but seems to have bottomed around 20-21 (PLI certifications in); possible QoQ improvement. Buy as a medium-term dark horse closer to 27-28, only as a small risky bet; don't commit large amounts to such small stocks.

recommendations.note: Buy only with medium-to-long-term view; doubt significant short-term returns; recently corrected.
recommendations.detail: Averaging is risky though EV-space interest is rising; better to wait until company problems sort out. Buy only with a medium-to-long-term view, in a standard/staggered manner; significant short-term returns doubtful; corrected recently.

recommendations.note: Buy only with medium-to-long-term view; corrected sharply recently; standard manner.
recommendations.detail: Buy only if you have a medium-to-long-term view; doubt significant short-term returns; corrected sharply recently; buy only in a standard/staggered manner.
